creator: futatuki@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
make install failed if CANNA option set and any of SJ3, FREEWNN, WNN6, WNN7 options don't set due to ${LOCALBASE}/lib/X11/ccdef handling in pkg-plist.

Fix: Apply the patch attached below.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Do make config, and set CANNA option, unset FREEWNN, WNN6, WNN7, SJ3 options.
Then make install.
